title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.48 — PLATE FUSION ROUND (user on v0.4.47: 'looks like it's just been copied and pasted on top... for all the big buttons' + text/spacing). ROOT CAUSE: live controls drew their own complete housings FLAT over the physically-lit plate — no baked bezels or cast shadows under them = sticker look. FIX (the full commercial pattern): plates now bake the tile BEZELS, power-button housings, emerald housings and glass decks (VU surrounds, G/R strip, metering bay) WITH their cast shadows; the live layer slims to caps-only — EB::backlitCap gained a housing param (cache-keyed; false under EPh::kPlates skips the bezel and leaves it transparent), OnOffButton and EmeraldSwitch skip their housing fills under kPlates (caps + glow spill only). TEXT: EB::inkText gained a justification param; all lens text (tile labels+values, selector tiles, IRON tile) is now LEFT-ALIGNED with 10px pad, matching the approved renders. SPACING: SUMMING AMP baked title realigned with the power row (y470, 11px). All four plates rebaked. VERIFY: controls should read as MOUNTED IN the panel (bezel + shadow from the plate, lens from the live layer); no more sticker edges; left-aligned lens text like the mockups; alignment at all 3 UI scales + both themes (cap inset 3.5px must sit inside the baked bezel ring). OPEN: further polish per Steve; LIMITER rename.
